name: Scorer Validation Relevance review for Validity Conditions and Controlled Comparison Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The bundle correctly treats SMART as scoring-adjacent item-difficulty evidence anchored to human-scored real responses and an LLM scoring model. It does not claim that any included study validates an operational automated scorer using synthetic responses alone.

findings.claim_or_issue: SMART informs an item-difficulty prediction workflow using generated responses and an LLM scoring model, but it is not final scorer-validation evidence by itself.
findings.why_it_matters: The review must preserve the boundary between validity-relevant supporting evidence and final operational validation evidence.
findings.recommended_action: Retain the SMART caveat in the finding and carry it into the unified literature review.
